CVE-2020-22219.title: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in function bitwriter_grow_ in flac ...
CVE-2020-22219.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in function bitwriter_grow_ in flac before 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to run arbitrary code via crafted input to the encoder.

CVE-2021-0561.title: In append_to_verify_fifo_interleaved_ of stream_encoder.c, there  ...
CVE-2021-0561.description: In append_to_verify_fifo_interleaved_ of stream_encoder.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.Product: AndroidVersions: Android-11Android ID: A-174302683
